title: August 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 12''' is the 224th day of the year (225th in leap years). There are 141 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Oliver Ford Davies]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Elaine Cunningham]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Yvette Nicole Brown]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Jennifer Seiden Schoonover]] is born.
*[[1980]] – ''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' published.
*1980 – ''[[Once Upon a Galaxy: A Journal of the Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[What's The Story?]] Round 1 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (soundtrack)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' soundtrack]] released.
*[[2009]] – [[The Clone Wars 8|''The Clone Wars'' 8]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Celebration V]] begins.
*2010 – [[Legacy (2006) 50|''Legacy'' (2006) 50]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Jedi Path and Book of Sith Deluxe Box Set]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Lando 2|''Lando'' 2]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars: Episode V — The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back'']] hardcover collection published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 8|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 8]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2020]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 4|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 4]] published.
<noinclude>
